anti_claim: This Batch-8 StationSurfaceAtlas layout fixture accepts TSX source-reference digest evidence, public Python-port geometry cases, and stable negative-case codes only. It does not run React, claim browser visual acceptance, mutate navigation graph authority, authorize publication, or approve release.

forbidden_public_inputs: raw navigation graph snapshots with private paths

standard_payload.anti_purpose: Fixture-only receipts, browser visual acceptance, navigation graph authority, source mutation, or claims about UI readiness.
failure_modes: failed/readiness-timeout posture no longer sorts first
unknown shell groups create ungoverned columns
receipts include source bodies or private runtime state
standard_payload.ontology: A public-safe Python port of the deterministic layoutNodes geometry from StationSurfaceAtlas.tsx.
standard_payload.teleology: Let a cold reader rerun the Atlas shell-packer semantics without needing React, a browser render, or live navigation graph state.

contract_projection_basis.authority_boundary: computed standard-lattice contract only; existing authority_ceiling remains the operative claim ceiling.

validation_rules: require exact copied TSX source reference
verify required layoutNodes and fitView anchors
match public banded slack geometry fixtures
require attention-sort, slack-lane, and unknown-group negatives
keep React runtime, browser render, navigation graph authority, publication, and release authority false

author.purpose: create a valid Batch 8 StationSurfaceAtlas layoutNodes port instance

refine_instance.purpose: improve an existing Batch 8 StationSurfaceAtlas layoutNodes port without corrupting authority

refine_standard_and_propagate.purpose: change std_microcosm_batch8_station_surface_atlas_layout_port and propagate through governed artifacts plus generated lattice projections

source_authority_ref: microcosm-substrate/AXIOMS.md#1 (JSON is contract; Markdown is projection)

doctrine_kind_envelope.note: This standard conforms to the universal doctrine-kind envelope; markdown, Mermaid, Atlas, coverage, health, and entry-card views are generated projections of this JSON source.

anti_claims: This Batch-8 StationSurfaceAtlas layout fixture accepts TSX source-reference digest evidence, public Python-port geometry cases, and stable negative-case codes only. It does not run React, claim browser visual acceptance, mutate navigation graph authority, authorize publication, or approve release.

Active v2 standard status is a source JSON contract state only; it does not expand release, publication, provider dispatch, private-root equivalence, or whole-system correctness authority beyond the authority_ceiling.

runtime_acceptance_refs.uplift_basis: registry accepted_public_runtime_standard plus standard-local validator_contract, receipt_contract, source_refs, authority_ceiling, and public_private_boundary.
